_comment: Configuration for the Dream Plaza standalone file. Unlike the EC files (which have 10 hotel tabs and bill each hotel as the customer at 50% Audico share), Dream Plaza files have ONE tab and bill DR PROPERTY SERVICES CORP directly at a 70% Audico share. Detection: single-tab file with column I labeled 'AUDICO%' and NO AUDICO U column. The audico_share_rate is the fraction of the customer-facing total that Audico keeps (and quotes the customer for).
_layout_note: 9-column layout: B=FECHA, C=CLIENTE (yellow=billable), D=DESCRIPCION, E=CANT, F=COSTO, G=DIA(S), H=TOTAL, I=AUDICO% (not AUDICO U). Unit price for the quote = COSTO × audico_share_rate.
_detection: A file is treated as Dream Plaza if: (a) it has exactly one tab, AND (b) the tab does not match any name in hotel_mapping.json's tabs list, AND (c) column I header text contains 'AUDICO%' (or '%' but not 'U').
